---
title: "Particle Physics"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .quarto-title-block {
    display: none;
  }
</style>

<div class="course-index">
  <header class="course-profile">
    <img class="course-profile-photo" src="assets/naumov-portrait.jpg" alt="Dmitry V. Naumov">
    <div class="course-profile-copy">
      <p class="course-kicker">Particle Physics</p>
      <h1>Courses and Mini-Courses</h1>
      <p>
        NeutrinoHit materials on particle physics: Baikal School introductory
        mini-course now, and a future bilingual 16-lecture course with slides
        and book materials.
      </p>
      <nav class="course-profile-links" aria-label="Section links">
        <a href="https://neutrinohit.github.io/">NeutrinoHit</a>
        <a href="https://neutrinohit.github.io/lectures.html">All lectures</a>
        <a href="https://t.me/NeutrinoHit">Telegram</a>
        <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@dmitrynaumov6099/">YouTube</a>
      </nav>
    </div>
  </header>

  <section class="course-intro">
    <h2>Section Materials</h2>
    <p>
      This repository is the main home for particle-physics courses in the
      NeutrinoHit structure. Common site/reveal assets are synced from
      neutrinohit-map; each course keeps its own local Quarto configuration.
    </p>
  </section>

  <section class="course-accordion" aria-label="Particle physics materials">
    <details class="course-row" open>
      <summary>
        <span class="course-row-kind">Mini-course</span>
        <span>Introduction to Particle Physics · Baikal School</span>
      </summary>
      <div class="course-row-body">
        <p>
          A two-lecture English mini-course: particles, fields, interactions,
          Standard Model structure, weak interaction, and neutrinos.
        </p>
        <div class="course-links">
          <a href="IntroParticlePhysicsBaikal/">Open mini-course</a>
          <a href="IntroParticlePhysicsBaikal/slides/01_particles_fields_interactions.html">Lecture 1</a>
          <a href="IntroParticlePhysicsBaikal/slides/02_standard_model_neutrinos.html">Lecture 2</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </details>

    <details class="course-row">
      <summary>
        <span class="course-row-kind">Course</span>
        <span>Particle Physics</span>
      </summary>
      <div class="course-row-body">
        <p>
          Scaffold for a future 16-lecture bilingual course. Content will be
          added later; the RU/EN slides and book directories are already in place.
        </p>
        <div class="course-links">
          <a href="ParticlePhysics/">Open course scaffold</a>
          <a href="ParticlePhysics/ru/slides/">RU slides</a>
          <a href="ParticlePhysics/en/slides/">EN slides</a>
          <a href="ParticlePhysics/ru/book/">RU book</a>
          <a href="ParticlePhysics/en/book/">EN book</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </details>
  </section>
</div>
```
